name: Assyrian king tries to sell weird relic...
description:
The legendary Assyrian king Ashurbanipal resurrected from the dead, having been buried with his prized possession, a Numidian alien pharaoh mummy named Yakub. Now, Ashurbanipal is going around the modern world, trying to sell Yakub, trying to see how Ea-Nasir did business. The thing is, Yakub doesn’t look entirely dead...
